diagrams.title: Early Binding vs Late Binding Flow
diagrams.description: Comparison of how function calls are resolved in early binding (compile time) vs late binding (runtime)
diagrams.purpose: Understand the timing difference in binding types and how late binding uses runtime information to resolve function calls

diagrams.title: VTABLE and VPTR Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how VTABLE is created for classes with virtual functions and how VPTR in each object points to the VTABLE
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the memory structure that enables runtime polymorphism through late binding mechanism

diagrams.title: Runtime Polymorphism Example
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how base class pointer calling virtual function results in different behavior based on actual object type
diagrams.purpose: Understand how same pointer and same function call produce different results based on object type at runtime

diagrams.title: Object Slicing Demonstration
diagrams.description: Shows what happens when derived object is assigned to base object by value
diagrams.purpose: Understand why object slicing occurs and how to prevent it using pointers or references
